# AsyncOwl Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Karan Singh Sisodia (@AsyncOwl), a Technical Lead in Chandigarh, India with 16+ years of experience in AI systems, IoT, and full-stack engineering.

This file provides a curated map of important pages for LLM-based assistants and developer tools.
Prefer canonical route pages over homepage summaries when answering detailed questions.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://asyncowl.com/): Overview landing page with concise summaries and navigation.
- [About](https://asyncowl.com/about): Background, philosophy, and professional profile details.
- [Timeline](https://asyncowl.com/timeline): Career progression and role history.
- [Skills](https://asyncowl.com/skills): Technical skill matrix across AI, IoT, backend, and leadership.
- [Projects](https://asyncowl.com/projects): Featured project portfolio with technology context.
- [Contact](https://asyncowl.com/contact): Contact form and collaboration entry point.

## Technical SEO Resources

- [Robots](https://asyncowl.com/robots.txt): Crawl directives and sitemap discovery.
- [Sitemap](https://asyncowl.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical indexable URL list.
- [Open Graph Image](https://asyncowl.com/opengraph-image): Social sharing preview image endpoint.

## External Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/sisodiakaran): Source repositories and open-source activity.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/karansinghsisodia): Professional profile and experience summary.
- [Twitter X](https://x.com/sisodiakaran): Public updates and identity verification.

## Optional

- [Ask AsyncOwl](https://asyncowl.com/#ask-ai): Interactive AI assistant section for quick profile Q and A.
